risks: No managed identity configured on any resource — Function App and IoT Hub rely on connection strings rather than identity-based auth
ACR has adminUserEnabled: true — violates least-privilege; prefer managed identity for IoT Edge image pulls
All resources have publicNetworkAccess: Enabled with no VNet or private endpoint isolation
No Key Vault resource for secret management (connection strings, API keys, Twilio credentials)
Cosmos DB Serverless is single-region (eastus) with no failover — single point of failure for event storage
Storage Account uses Standard_LRS — no zone redundancy; risk of data loss in datacenter failure
Anomaly Detector container for IoT Edge is retiring October 2026 — need migration plan to custom ML model or ONNX Runtime
SMS delivery via Logic App requires third-party Twilio account or Azure Communication Services resource not included in plan
No diagnostic settings linking IoT Hub, Function App, or Cosmos DB to the Log Analytics workspace
Function App missing Application Insights for runtime monitoring and distributed tracing
correctionsRecommended: Add a User-Assigned Managed Identity resource and assign it to the Function App with RBAC roles: Storage Blob Data Owner, Storage Blob Data Contributor, Storage Queue Data Contributor, Storage Table Data Contributor, and Monitoring Metrics Publisher
Set adminUserEnabled: false on ACR and configure managed identity-based image pull for IoT Edge deployments
Add an Application Insights resource (Microsoft.Insights/components) connected to the Log Analytics workspace and wire it to the Function App via APPINSIGHTS_INSTRUMENTATIONKEY
Add Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings resources for IoT Hub, Function App, Cosmos DB, and Logic App to send logs and metrics to the Log Analytics workspace
Add a Key Vault resource (Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults) to store IoT Hub connection strings, Cosmos DB keys, and Twilio API credentials
Disable storage account local auth (allowSharedKeyAccess: false) and use identity-based access per Azure best practices
Consider upgrading Storage SKU from Standard_LRS to Standard_ZRS for zone redundancy in production
Add an Azure Communication Services resource as an alternative to Twilio for SMS, keeping the solution Azure-native
